nodes.description: A professional who researches and analyzes government policies, often for think tanks or consulting firms, using knowledge gained from civil services preparation.

nodes.title: Portfolio Manager
nodes.description: Investment professional who manages client or fund portfolios by making asset-allocation and security-selection decisions.

nodes.title: Pre-primary School Coordinator
nodes.description: An education professional who coordinates nursery and kindergarten curriculum, teachers, parent communication and daily pre-primary operations.

nodes.title: Primary School Academic Coordinator
nodes.description: An academic coordinator who oversees curriculum implementation, teacher support, and learning activities for primary classes in a school.

nodes.title: Primary School Teacher (Private)
nodes.description: A teacher employed by a privately-owned school to teach students in primary classes (typically 1 to 5), often requiring D.El.Ed. qualification.

nodes.title: Principal Engineer
nodes.description: A senior technical leadership role responsible for architecture, complex engineering decisions, and cross-team technical direction.

nodes.title: Private Ayurvedic Practitioner
nodes.description: A BAMS-qualified physician who diagnoses and treats patients using Ayurvedic medicine in private hospitals, clinics, or wellness centres.

nodes.title: Private Homoeopathic Practitioner
nodes.description: A registered BHMS doctor providing homeopathic consultation and treatment in a private clinic or hospital setting.

nodes.title: Private Tutor
nodes.description: An educator providing personalized academic instruction to elementary school students outside the formal school system.

nodes.title: Product Designer
nodes.description: Designs and develops physical products, from concept and prototyping to manufacturing, considering user needs, aesthetics, and functionality.

nodes.title: Product Manager
nodes.description: A professional responsible for a product's strategy, roadmap, and feature definition for an organization, often acting as a mini-CEO for the product.

nodes.title: Product Manager (Pharmaceuticals)
nodes.description: A marketing professional responsible for the strategy, promotion, and profitability of a specific pharmaceutical product or brand, often requiring an MBA.

nodes.title: Production Engineer
nodes.description: An engineer responsible for supporting, monitoring, and improving manufacturing processes, output, and shop-floor operations.

nodes.title: Public Health Nurse
nodes.description: A nurse specialising in community-based preventive, promotive and primary healthcare programmes in public-health systems.

nodes.title: Public Health Programme Manager
nodes.description: A professional who plans, implements, monitors, and improves population-health programmes for government, nonprofit, or development-sector organisations.

nodes.title: Quality Control Analyst
nodes.description: A professional who tests products and materials in a manufacturing or production setting to ensure they meet quality and safety standards.

nodes.title: Quality Engineer
nodes.description: An engineer who applies inspection, quality-control, and continuous-improvement methods to ensure products and processes meet standards.

nodes.title: Radiographer
nodes.description: An allied healthcare professional who uses medical imaging equipment like X-rays, CT scans, and MRIs to create images of the body for diagnostic purposes.

nodes.title: Radiology Department Supervisor
nodes.description: A senior imaging-services professional who coordinates radiography staff, equipment workflow, records, safety compliance, and patient scheduling.

nodes.title: Regional Service Manager
nodes.description: A senior service leader responsible for service centres, technicians, performance targets, and customer support across a geographic region.

nodes.title: Regulatory Affairs Associate
nodes.description: Prepares and manages regulatory documentation to support approval, registration and compliant marketing of pharmaceutical products.

nodes.title: Research Assistant
nodes.description: A role supporting scientists by preparing experiments, collecting and analyzing data, and maintaining lab records in academic or R&D settings.

nodes.title: Research Scientist in Private Sector (R&D)
nodes.description: A scientist working for a private company in industries like pharmaceuticals or biotechnology, where a NET qualification is a valuable credential.

nodes.title: Sailor (Merchant Navy)
nodes.description: A seafaring professional working on commercial vessels, responsible for the operation and maintenance of the ship, often requiring specific STCW certifications.

nodes.title: Sales Executive
nodes.description: An entry-level role responsible for selling products or services, managing client relationships, and meeting sales targets.

nodes.title: Sales Manager
nodes.description: A manager responsible for sales strategy, team performance, revenue targets, and customer acquisition for a territory or business unit.

nodes.title: Sales Team Leader
nodes.description: A first-line sales supervisor who leads a small team, monitors performance, and supports target achievement.

nodes.title: Scientist in a Government Research Organisation (CSIR, DRDO, etc.)
aliases: Research Scientist in a Public Sector Undertaking (PSU)
nodes.description: A research and development role in a government-funded organization, for which CSIR-NET scores are often used for shortlisting candidates.

nodes.title: Seafood Quality Control Officer
nodes.description: Monitors hygiene, quality standards, processing practices and regulatory compliance in seafood processing and export units.

nodes.title: Secondary School Teacher (Private)
nodes.description: A teacher in a private educational institution responsible for instructing students in one or more subjects at the secondary level, typically grades 6 through 10.

nodes.title: Secretarial Executive
nodes.description: An entry-level corporate secretarial role assisting with Companies Act compliance, board and shareholder meeting documentation, and ROC filings.

nodes.title: Security Manager
nodes.description: A manager who leads a corporate security team and oversees risk assessments, vendor guards, emergency response, and security operations across facilities.

nodes.title: Security Supervisor
nodes.description: A frontline supervisor who deploys guards, monitors shifts, handles incidents, and ensures site-security procedures are followed.

nodes.title: Senior Accountant
nodes.description: An experienced accounting professional who oversees complex bookkeeping, reconciliations, financial statements, and junior accounting staff.

nodes.title: Senior Content Writer
nodes.description: An experienced writer who produces and edits high-quality content while guiding junior writers and owning larger content assignments.

nodes.title: Senior Corporate Counsel
nodes.description: A senior in-house lawyer who independently leads complex commercial, regulatory, transaction, and strategic legal matters for a company.

nodes.title: Senior Educational Content Developer
nodes.description: An experienced educational-content professional who leads the creation, review, and quality assurance of curriculum-aligned learning materials.

nodes.title: Senior Engineer
nodes.description: An experienced engineering role involving leading projects, mentoring junior engineers, and handling complex technical challenges in the private sector.

nodes.title: Senior Fashion Designer
nodes.description: An experienced fashion designer who leads seasonal collections, mentors junior designers, and manages design development for a brand or manufacturer.

nodes.title: Senior Graphic Designer
nodes.description: An experienced graphic designer who leads complex visual-design projects, mentors junior designers, and maintains brand consistency.

nodes.title: Senior Industrial Technician
nodes.description: An experienced technician responsible for complex troubleshooting, mentoring junior staff, and overseeing major repair and installation projects.

nodes.title: Senior Junior Engineer (PSU)
nodes.description: A higher technical supervisory role in a PSU, typically reached by Junior Engineers through experience and internal promotion.

nodes.title: Senior Lab Technician
nodes.description: An experienced technician responsible for complex tests, training junior staff, and maintaining lab equipment and quality standards.

nodes.title: Senior Operation Theatre Technician
nodes.description: An experienced operation theatre technician who handles complex procedures, guides junior technicians, and coordinates theatre readiness.

nodes.title: Senior Physiotherapist
nodes.description: An experienced physiotherapist who manages complex cases, supervises junior staff and coordinates rehabilitation services in a clinical setting.

nodes.title: Senior Product Designer
nodes.description: Leads end-to-end design of complex physical products, mentoring designers and coordinating with engineering and manufacturing teams.

nodes.title: Senior Radiographer
nodes.description: An experienced radiographer who handles complex imaging procedures, quality assurance, patient safety, and may guide junior radiography staff.

nodes.title: Senior Sales Executive
nodes.description: A sales professional with greater responsibility for key accounts, larger targets, and mentoring junior sales staff.

nodes.title: Senior Software Engineer
nodes.description: An experienced software developer who takes on more complex projects, mentors junior developers, and contributes to system architecture.

nodes.title: Senior UI/UX Designer
nodes.description: Leads end-to-end interface and user-experience design for digital products, including complex flows and design-system work.

nodes.title: Senior Vocational Instructor at a Private Institute
nodes.description: A senior trade instructor who leads advanced batches, mentors instructors, and coordinates practical training delivery in private vocational institutes.

nodes.title: SEO Content Writer
nodes.description: A content writer specialising in search-engine-optimised articles and web pages based on keyword and search-intent research.

nodes.title: SEO Manager
nodes.description: Leads the search engine optimization strategy and team to increase a website's visibility and organic search results.

nodes.title: Service Designer
nodes.description: A designer who improves end-to-end customer journeys and service systems across digital and physical touchpoints.

nodes.title: Service Manager
nodes.description: A professional responsible for managing a company's service operations, including maintenance, repairs, and customer support, often in manufacturing or engineering sectors.

nodes.title: Service Operations Manager
nodes.description: A manager who leads end-to-end service delivery operations, including field teams, service processes, turnaround times, and customer satisfaction.

nodes.title: Set Designer
nodes.description: A professional who designs and creates the sets for theatre, film, or television productions.

nodes.title: Skill Assessor for Vocational Qualifications
nodes.description: An assessor who evaluates candidates' practical trade competencies for vocational certification and recognition-of-prior-learning programmes.

nodes.title: Social Media Manager
nodes.description: Manages a brand's online presence and campaigns on social media platforms to increase engagement and brand awareness.

nodes.title: Social Worker
nodes.description: A professional who supports individuals, families and communities through casework, counselling, referrals and welfare interventions.

nodes.title: Software Developer
nodes.description: An entry-level professional who designs, develops, tests, and maintains software applications and systems.

nodes.title: Sports Physiotherapist
nodes.description: A specialized physiotherapist who works with athletes and sports teams to prevent, diagnose, treat, and rehabilitate injuries related to sports and exercise.

nodes.title: Staff Nurse
nodes.description: A registered nurse providing direct patient care in clinical settings like hospitals, clinics, and long-term care facilities.

nodes.title: Systems Analyst
nodes.description: An IT professional who specializes in analyzing, designing, and implementing information systems to solve business problems.

nodes.title: Tax Associate
nodes.description: An entry-level tax professional who assists with income-tax, GST compliance, return preparation, and tax documentation.

nodes.title: Technical Lead
nodes.description: An engineering lead who guides a project team's technical design, implementation, reviews, and delivery.

nodes.title: Technician in Public Sector Undertaking (PSU)
nodes.description: A skilled technical role involving the maintenance, operation, and repair of machinery and equipment within a government-owned corporation like BHEL, SAIL, or NTPC.

nodes.title: Ticketing and Reservations Executive
nodes.description: A travel-industry professional who manages flight, rail, hotel and other travel reservations using booking systems.

nodes.title: Tour Operations Executive
nodes.description: An entry-level tourism professional who coordinates tour packages, bookings, suppliers, guides and customer logistics.

nodes.title: Travel Consultant
nodes.description: A travel-services professional who advises clients and arranges itineraries, transport, accommodation, visas and holiday packages.

nodes.title: UI/UX Designer
nodes.description: Designs user interfaces and experiences for websites, applications, and other digital products to ensure they are intuitive, accessible, and enjoyable for users.

nodes.title: Upper Primary School Teacher in a Private School
nodes.description: A teacher who teaches Classes VI to VIII in a private school, typically using CTET Paper II eligibility alongside the required academic and teacher-education qualifications.

nodes.title: Urban Planner
nodes.description: A professional who develops plans and programs for the use of land, helping create communities, accommodate population growth, and revitalize physical facilities in towns and cities.

nodes.title: Veterinarian
nodes.description: A licensed veterinary professional who diagnoses, treats and prevents diseases in companion animals, livestock and other animals.

nodes.title: Visual Merchandiser
nodes.description: A professional responsible for designing and creating attractive visual displays in retail outlets to attract customers and promote products.

nodes.title: Vocational Instructor (Private Institute)
nodes.description: An instructor teaching trade-specific skills at privately-owned Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs), vocational colleges, or corporate training centers.

nodes.title: Wealth Manager
nodes.description: Financial adviser who develops and manages investment, retirement and wealth plans for high-net-worth clients.

nodes.title: Web Developer
nodes.description: A programmer who creates and maintains websites and web applications, working on either the front-end, back-end, or both (full-stack).

nodes.title: Class 10 (Secondary School)
nodes.description: Completion of secondary school (Class 10) under CBSE, ICSE, or a state board — the first major branching point in the Indian education system.

nodes.title: Arts & Humanities Stream (11th & 12th)
nodes.description: Senior-secondary humanities stream (History, Political Science, Psychology, Languages, etc.) leading toward BA, law, design, civil services, media and social sciences.

nodes.title: Commerce Stream (11th & 12th)
nodes.description: Senior-secondary commerce stream (Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics) leading toward B.Com, CA/CS/CMA, management, finance and law.

nodes.title: Science Stream — PCB (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
nodes.description: Senior-secondary science stream with Physics, Chemistry and Biology; the standard route toward medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, nursing and life sciences.

nodes.title: Science Stream — PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Maths)
nodes.description: Senior-secondary science stream with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics; the standard route toward engineering, architecture, defence and quantitative fields.

nodes.title: Science Stream — PCMB (Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Biology)
nodes.description: Senior-secondary science stream keeping both Mathematics and Biology, preserving eligibility for both engineering and medical entrance exams.

nodes.title: BARC Orientation Course for Engineering Graduates and Science Postgraduates
nodes.description: A one-year BARC Orientation Course for selected OCES candidates that prepares them for Scientific Officer appointments in the Department of Atomic Energy.

nodes.title: CA Articleship Practical Training
nodes.description: Mandatory supervised practical training under a practising Chartered Accountant or eligible organisation for CA students who have passed CA Intermediate.

nodes.title: Craft Instructor Training Scheme (CITS)
nodes.description: A one-year program to train ITI graduates as certified instructors for ITIs and other vocational training centers.

nodes.title: DAE Graduate Fellowship Scheme Fellowship
nodes.description: A Department of Atomic Energy fellowship for selected DGFS candidates to pursue sponsored postgraduate study before joining the DAE as a Scientific Officer.

nodes.title: ICMAI Practical Training
nodes.description: Mandatory supervised practical training under ICMAI rules, undertaken after CMA Intermediate registration to gain cost and management accounting experience.

nodes.title: ICSI Long-Term Practical Training
nodes.description: Mandatory practical training under ICSI, ordinarily undertaken after passing CS Executive as part of qualification for Associate Company Secretary membership.

nodes.title: ITI (Industrial Training Institute)
nodes.description: Government-recognized vocational trade training (1-2 years) after Class 10 in trades like electrician, fitter, welder, COPA; leads to apprenticeships and skilled-trade employment.

nodes.title: Para Regiment Probation
nodes.description: A demanding volunteer selection and probation process for serving Indian Army personnel seeking transfer to the Parachute Regiment or its special-forces stream.
